summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of The Invisible Agent trade tracker ERP. Both backend APIs and frontend UI are highly functional with 94% overall success rate.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns status 200 instead of 201 for successful creation
minor_bugs.impact: Functional but incorrect HTTP status code

ui_bugs.issue: Click to close dropdown gets intercepted by HTML overlay
ui_bugs.selector: body click after notification dropdown opens

console_warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility
Chart width/height calculation warnings during initial render
console_warnings.impact: Console noise, charts render correctly after brief delay

passed_tests: New Trade Form with Triple-Ledger Live Calculations
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fixes: 1) Update POST /api/trades endpoint to return 201 status code instead of 200. 2) Fix notification dropdown click overlay issue (possibly add force:true or z-index adjustment). 3) Add aria-describedby to DialogContent for accessibility.
